channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Spruce Meadows Hosts Celebration of Pets for a Fun-Filled Weekend
item.description: Spruce Meadows in Calgary became the focal point of a weekend celebration dedicated to pets, as animal lovers from across the region gathered to enjoy a variety of activities designed to celebrate the...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee Criticises BJP's Campaign Tactics in West Bengal Assembly Elections
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has accused the BJP of deploying its entire machinery, including the Union Cabinet and 19 NDA-ruled state Chief Ministers, to influence the upcoming state as...

item.title: Stormers overpower Glasgow to reclaim top spot in URC standings
item.description: The Stormers delivered a commanding performance in Cape Town, beating the Glasgow Warriors 48–12 to return to the top of the United Rugby Championship table and all but secure a quarter-final berth. F...

item.title: Byelection timing could give Liberals strategic edge over NDP in key ridings
item.description: The article examines how the federal Liberal Party may benefit strategically from controlling the timing of upcoming byelections, particularly following the departure of NDP MP Alexandre Boulerice fro...

item.title: President Zardari visits China to strengthen economic ties and review CPEC projects
item.description: President Asif Ali Zardari reached China in the early hours of Saturday for an official visit aimed at enhancing economic cooperation and reviewing the progress of the China-Pakistan Economic Corridor...

item.title: Over 7,600 OFWs safely repatriated amid Middle East tensions, says DMW
item.description: The Department of Migrant Workers (DMW) reported that a total of 7,674 overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) have been repatriated due to the ongoing conflict and rising tensions in parts of the Middle Eas...

item.title: Opposition Parties Plan Unified Presidential Candidate for 2027 Elections
item.description: Opposition political parties for Nigeria don yan say dem go put one person as their presidential candidate for 2027 general elections. The matter na result of national summit wey happen for Ibadan, Oy...

item.title: OpenAI CEO Issues Apology for Delayed Reporting in Tumbler Ridge Shooting Case
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman issued a formal apology to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, following criticism over the company's handling of a flagged ChatGPT account connected to a suspect in a mass s...

item.title: Ladakh Allows Lower-Qualified Government Staff to Apply for Graduate-Level Jobs
item.description: The Ladakh administration, led by Lieutenant Governor VK Saxena, has decided to remove previous restrictions that prevented government employees with lower educational qualifications from applying for...

item.title: Liberian Woman Admits to Staging Kidnapping, Faces Legal Scrutiny
item.description: Ame T. Dean, a 26-year-old woman from Liberia, caused quite a commotion after she was initially reported missing and a search effort launched on social media. Her sister raised the alarm, and netizens...

item.title: Cagayan de Oro Prepares for Impact of El Niño on Agriculture
item.description: The local government of Cagayan de Oro City has put in place a series of measures to mitigate the effects of the looming El Niño phenomenon, especially on farmers in the upland barangays. Task Force E...

item.title: Thato Kabeli wins RMB Ultra Trail Drakensberg 100-miler on debut
item.description: Thato Kabeli delivered an outstanding performance to win the RMB Ultra Trail Drakensberg (UTD) 100-mile race in his first attempt at the distance. The 42-year-old South African, who works as a securit...

item.title: Manchester City Come From Behind to Defeat Southampton and Qualify for FA Cup Final
item.description: Manchester City show strong character as dem come from behind to beat Southampton 2-1 and secure place for FA Cup final. The match no easy at all, especially as Southampton, wey dey Championship, put ...

item.title: Tragic incident in London park results in the deaths of a woman and child in water
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in a London park where a woman and a child lost their lives after getting into difficulty in the water. Emergency services were called immediately after the situation was re...

item.title: Outgoing Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán Will Not Take Parliamentary Seat After Election Defeat
item.description: Outgoing Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has announced that he will not assume his seat in the Hungarian Parliament following the recent election, which marked the end of his 16-year tenure in p...

item.title: Debate over AFL Appeals Board decision on Lance Collard's homophobic slur
item.description: The Lance Collard case has sparked debate following the AFL Appeals Board's decision to reduce his seven-week suspension to two weeks after using a homophobic slur in a VFL match. Mitchell Johnson hig...

item.title: Advocate proposes renaming English to 'American' as official U.S. language
item.description: As the United States approaches its 250th anniversary, a push has emerged to formally rename the nation's official language from English to 'American.' Rob Lockwood, a former adviser to Doug Burgum, w...

item.title: Terry Pluto on the Browns’ first-round priorities and team focus
item.description: This article focuses on Terry Pluto’s perspective on the Cleveland Browns as they approach the first round of the NFL Draft. The central idea is that the team needs to stay disciplined and avoid getti...

item.title: Trump halts US envoys' planned trip to Pakistan, undermining Iran peace talks
item.description: US President Donald Trump has cancelled a planned visit to Pakistan by two envoys, special envoy Steve Witkoff and his son-in-law Jared Kushner, dealing a setback to ongoing peace talks aimed at resol...

item.title: J&K Political Parties Urge Temporary Release for Engineer Rashid to Visit Hospitalised Father
item.description: In Jammu and Kashmir, political parties have come together in support of Engineer Rashid, the jailed Member of Parliament from Baramulla, urging authorities to grant him temporary bail on humanitarian...
